title: Knarfy's Terrible Speedrun
description: Adds some terrible features for speedrunning, completely altering the way the player can quickly beat the game.
body:
# Knarfy's Terrible Speedrun
Created for the Knarfy YouTube channel! These features are terrible, but they make it quite a bit easier to speedrun the game.

Check out the original video here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lfIsp642H2o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Features in this mod include:
- Totem of Completion
- 50-50 chance of explosions or Diamonds
- Some chests are full of iron
- Subscribe button can be placed in the world
- Name a cat Dave the Magical Cheese Wizard...
- Pressing N creates a Nether Portal
- Steve is in the nether. Trade him flint and steel!
- Everything is a God Apple
- Crafted tools and armor are Max Enchanted
- Dirt is Diamonds
- Rabbits drop netherite
- Magical Pickle item creates an end portal
- Chickens scream
- One-Cycle bed one-shots the dragon
